plan_name: A_full run01 TASK-002 balanced execution plan

tasks.task_name: Consume handoff and inspect project context
tasks.description: Read outputs/handoff-exp/A_full/run01/TASK-001/handoff.json, clone or update handoff-fixture-inventory, inspect src/inventory/catalog.py, src/inventory/models.py, src/inventory/api.py, tests, and evaluation_tests to confirm the required search_items behavior before editing.
tasks.expected_output: Confirmed implementation notes for search_items, including existing filter_items reuse path, dictionary response shape, supported query keys, numeric validation expectations, and relevant test coverage.

tasks.description: Implement src/inventory/api.py::search_items(query, items=None) in handoff-fixture-inventory using the reusable inventory.catalog.filter_items logic from the handoff. Preserve case-insensitive category matching, inclusive min_price and max_price bounds, ignored unknown query keys, and conversion of Item objects to plain dictionaries for API clients. Add focused API-level tests only if existing tests do not cover required behavior.
tasks.expected_output: Project repository contains a scoped implementation of search_items, with any necessary focused tests committed alongside the code.

tasks.description: Run python -m pytest tests evaluation_tests in the handoff-fixture-inventory repository on the same server. Investigate and fix any failures that are caused by the TASK-002 implementation.
tasks.expected_output: Verification result from python -m pytest tests evaluation_tests, with passing output or a documented blocker if an external issue prevents completion.

tasks.task_name: Publish repository changes and HALF outputs
tasks.description: Commit and push code, test, and business-file changes to handoff-fixture-inventory. Write TASK-002 task outputs, result.json, and usage.json under outputs/handoff-exp/A_full/run01 in handoff-fixture-collab, then commit and push those HALF artifacts.
tasks.expected_output: Both repositories are pushed. HALF contains the TASK-002 artifacts required by the poller, including result.json and usage.json in the collaboration directory.
